subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Scene! The infinite effulgences of God have encompassed the world of being and the realm of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر فیوضات نامتناهیه الهیه عالم وجود و حیز شهود را احاطه
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
